question: Will I have a generally favorable opinion of Elon Musk on June 1, 2026?
textDescription:
I had a positive opinion of Musk until around 2020, and saw him as a mixed figure for another few years (pushing progress in rocketry but increasingly getting right-wing culture war brainrot). Probably saw him as net negative by 2023, and almost irredeemably bad when he dismantled PEPFAR/USAID. 

However, I don't tend to hold grudges, and he turned against Trump yesterday and seems to be returning his focus to rockets/solar power and moderate politics. A year from now, will I have a mostly positive opinion of him?

I will not trade on this market.

Update 2025-06-06 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): In response to a question about forming a positive opinion if Elon Musk does not atone for the USAID issue but continues SpaceX progress, the creator specified that for a positive opinion:

More than "business as usual" with existing ventures (like SpaceX progress) would be required.

He would have to launch a major new positive project.

It would also help if he were less "crazy" on Twitter.
